shuffle_options.D: Corticosteroids, 60 mg prednisone equivalent, by mouth daily
Observe and follow up in 3 months

shuffle_options.B: Check blood pressure and obtain complete blood cell count and metabolic panel
shuffle_options.C: Perform bilateral pars plana vitrectomy with or without scleral buckle for retinal detachment repair
